title: The Harness Thesis
learningObjectives: State the harness thesis and explain why model choice accounts for only 10–15% of output quality variance compared to harness design.
Trace every stage of the run lifecycle — from parse_skills() through compress_and_store() — and name the file responsible for each.
Design a one-factor completely randomized experiment for evaluating a harness change, identifying response variables, controlled variables, and randomization strategy.
Explain why the evaluator and producer must be different models and describe the consequences of circular self-evaluation.
List the six harness engineering design principles and apply them to a hypothetical agentic system design.

readings.title: Before You Start: Prerequisites & Learning Path
